basics.name: appNamePrefix
basics.label: App name prefix
basics.toolTip: Common name used as a prefix for all resources. A short unique suffix is added automatically. Letters and numbers only, 2-11 characters.

constraints.validationMessage: Start with a letter; letters and numbers only; 2-11 characters.

basics.name: logAnalyticsWorkspaceName
basics.label: Existing Log Analytics workspace name
basics.toolTip: Name of the existing Log Analytics workspace in the selected resource group. It is not created by this template.

elements.name: rvncApiKey
elements.toolTip: RealVNC portal API accessKey. Stored as a Key Vault secret.

elements.name: rvncApiKeyId
elements.toolTip: RealVNC portal API accessKeyId. Stored as a Key Vault secret.

elements.name: scheduleNcrontab
elements.label: Timer schedule (NCRONTAB)
elements.toolTip: How often the function runs. Default is every 10 minutes. Format: seconds minutes hours day month day-of-week.

elements.name: lookbackMs
elements.label: Lookback window (ms)
elements.toolTip: How far back each run pulls audit logs, in milliseconds. Keep >= the schedule interval. Default 900000 (15 min).

elements.name: packageUri
elements.label: Function package URL
elements.toolTip: URL of released-package.zip. Leave default to use the latest GitHub release.
